rationale: The technical signal to SHORT lacks any conviction, showing 0/100 confidence and zero agreement from all six independent strategies, indicating an extremely weak systematic case. While RSI is overbought, the NASDAQ 100 was making new all-time highs on the signal date (2026-04-24), fundamentally contradicting a short position at that time. Although subsequent news points to minor dips in futures due to geopolitical tensions, this is not a strong enough catalyst to act on a technically baseless signal, especially given the market's recent record-setting performance and prevailing long sentiment.
